metadata.title: Web3, Blockchain & AI Fundamentals Knowledge Graph
metadata.description: Concept dependency graph for the Web3 OJT Course — 12 nodes, 16 edges
metadata.source: Common Computer, 2024 — Web3 Blockchain AI OJT Materials

nodes.name: Web3.0 & Protocol Understanding
nodes.description: Web1/2/3의 진화 과정과 프로토콜 기반 경제의 개념. 중앙화된 플랫폼에서 사용자 소유 인터넷으로의 패러다임 전환을 이해합니다.
key_ideas: Web1(read) → Web2(read+write) → Web3(read+write+own) evolution
Protocols replace intermediaries with open cooperation mechanisms
Trust shifts from social contracts to code-based contracts

nodes.name: DAO 101
nodes.description: 탈중앙화 자율 조직(DAO)의 정의, 3가지 핵심 구성요소(스마트 컨트랙트, 거버넌스 토큰, 온체인 트레저리), 점진적 탈중앙화 전략을 학습합니다.
key_ideas: Three pillars: smart contracts (rules), governance tokens (voting), on-chain treasury
DAO vs corporation: direct democracy vs delegated hierarchy
Progressive decentralization: PMF → community → protocol handoff

nodes.name: Bitcoin & Ethereum
nodes.description: 비트코인의 P2P 전자화폐 원리와 이더리움의 튜링 완전 스마트 컨트랙트 플랫폼을 비교하며 블록체인의 기술적 진화를 이해합니다.
key_ideas: Bitcoin: cryptographic proof replaces trusted third parties (Satoshi, 2008)
Ethereum: Turing-complete smart contracts on a global state machine (Vitalik, 2014)
EVM, Gas, ERC-20/721 standards, PoW→PoS transition

nodes.name: Decentralization & Consensus
nodes.description: 탈중앙화의 3가지 축(아키텍처, 정치, 논리), Byzantine 장군 문제, 나카모토 컨센서스, DID와 헤드리스 브랜드 개념을 깊이 있게 탐구합니다.
key_ideas: Three axes: architectural, political, logical decentralization (Vitalik)
Three justifications: fault tolerance, attack resistance, collusion resistance
Byzantine fault tolerance and Nakamoto consensus via economic incentives

nodes.name: Strong & Weak Technology / Metaverse
nodes.description: Chris Dixon의 강한/약한 기술 프레임워크로 블록체인의 위치를 분석하고, 메타버스의 7가지 필수 요소와 AI/블록체인/XR의 수렴을 조망합니다.
key_ideas: Strong tech reshapes the world; weak tech conforms to it (Chris Dixon)
Seven metaverse essentials: decentralization, property rights, self-sovereign identity, composability, open source, community ownership, reputation
Convergence of blockchain (ownership) + AI (intelligence) + XR (space)

nodes.name: Tokenology
nodes.description: 토큰의 경제적 역할, ERC-20/721 표준, 토크놀로지의 4가지 설계 공간, 교환 수단 토큰의 가치 평가(M×V=P×Q), 메트칼프 법칙을 학습합니다.
key_ideas: Tokenology vs tokenomics: vector (direction+meaning) vs scalar (size only)
Four design spaces: ownership, alignment, incentive, access
Equation of exchange M×V=P×Q and Metcalfe's law N² for network valuation

nodes.name: NFTs Authenticate the World
nodes.description: NFT의 철학적 기초(Type/Token 구분), 8가지 속성, 가치 원천으로서의 커뮤니티, Vitalik의 정당성 이론, 창작자 경제 재구성을 탐구합니다.
key_ideas: Type vs Token: ERC-20 is a type (fungible), ERC-721 is a token (unique)
NFT value comes from community — 'NFTs are monetized memes' (Naval)
Legitimacy theory: higher-order pattern of acceptance determines value (Vitalik)

nodes.name: Advanced NFT Concepts
nodes.description: 1,000 True Fans 경제학, Subscribe-to-Mint 모델, 스큐어모프 개념, 진화하는 NFT의 5가지 유형(Lifeforms, Corruptions, Chaos Roads, Fini, Uniswap LP)을 학습합니다.
key_ideas: 1,000 True Fans: creators need 1K dedicated fans × $100/yr (Kevin Kelly)
NFTs transform creator economy: remove intermediaries, granular pricing, users become owners
Five evolving NFT types: behavior-based, time-based, block-based, real-world-data, DeFi-based

nodes.name: AI x Blockchain
nodes.description: AI의 롱테일 문제와 크립토의 해법(자율 마켓플레이스), GPU 경제학의 $200B 질문, 블록체인 컴퓨팅의 4가지 시대를 분석합니다.
key_ideas: AI long-tail problem: centralized data monopoly fails at rare cases (a16z)
Crypto solution: autonomous marketplace with smart contracts + neural networks
Four eras of blockchain computing: calculator → mainframe → server → cloud

nodes.name: AINFT
nodes.description: AINFT(Autonomous Intelligent NFT)의 정의, 동적 메타데이터 구조, 3가지 핵심 속성(책임성, 재현성, 가치), AINFT Factory 인프라를 학습합니다.
key_ideas: AINFT = NFT + AI logic + dynamic metadata that grows over time
Three properties: accountable (on-chain record), reproducible, valuable (component-level rewards)
AINFT Factory: community API platform for building AINFT tokenomics

nodes.name: ERC-8004 Trustless Agents
nodes.description: AI 에이전트 경제의 신뢰 문제와 ERC-8004 표준의 3개 레지스트리(Identity, Reputation, Validation), 에이전트 경제 스택을 학습합니다.
key_ideas: ERC-8004 = on-chain trust infrastructure for AI agents
Three registries: Identity (ERC-721 NFT), Reputation (verified feedback), Validation (zk/TEE/optimistic)
Agent economy stack: identity → payment (x402) → communication (A2A/MCP) → tools → accounts

nodes.name: OpenClaw
nodes.description: OpenClaw 자율 디지털 워커 프레임워크, Skills 기반 플러그인, CoinFello Skill의 위임된 권한 모델, 에이전트 경제의 세 기둥(AINFT+ERC-8004+OpenClaw) 수렴을 학습합니다.
key_ideas: OpenClaw: local AI agent framework for autonomous task execution (150K+ GitHub stars)
Delegated authority model: user delegates narrow permissions, agent never holds keys (ERC-4337 + ERC-7710)
Three pillars convergence: AINFT (ownership) + ERC-8004 (trust) + OpenClaw (execution)

edges.description: Web3 protocol concepts provide the foundation for understanding DAOs
Web3 vision motivates blockchain technology development
DAO governance deepens understanding of decentralization
Web3 paradigm analyzed through strong/weak tech lens
Decentralization theory informs metaverse design principles
ERC standards and blockchain mechanics underpin token design
DAO governance tokens motivate tokenology design
Token standards (ERC-721) are the technical basis of NFTs
Advanced NFT concepts build on fundamental understanding
Blockchain infrastructure needed to understand AI+blockchain convergence
Token incentives solve AI data marketplace cold start
Evolving NFTs are the precursor to AINFT concept
AI+blockchain convergence enables autonomous intelligent NFTs
AINFT characters can register in ERC-8004 for agent economy
ERC-8004 trust layer enables OpenClaw agents to participate in economy
